 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.13.3","title":"Media, voice, transcription, and streaming connector acceptance sweep","description":"Background:
- Deepgram, ElevenLabs, Whisper, YouTube, Reddit, and related media or voice connectors have chunking, streaming, upload/download, or long-running job semantics that require better acceptance coverage than static fixtures.

Deliverables:
- Sweep media, voice, transcription, and other streaming-heavy connectors for truthful acceptance across uploads, streamed outputs, retries, chunking, and artifact logging.
- Reuse the shared HTTP and streaming harnesses where possible.

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.14","title":"Provider-sandbox and nightly live-suite program for connectors that cannot stop at local fixtures","description":"Background:
- Some connectors cannot be fully proven by local fixtures alone; they need vendor sandboxes, bridge daemons, or nightly live runs with controlled credentials and cost caps.
- Without a formal live-suite policy, teams either skip live checks entirely or run fragile ad hoc scripts that produce poor diagnostics.

Deliverables:
- Define and implement the provider-sandbox/nightly-live layer for connectors that need it.
- Establish secret management, account provisioning, cost ceilings, cleanup policies, scheduling, flaky-test quarantine, and artifact retention.
- Record which connectors must have live suites, which can rely on local fixtures, and which require both.

Acceptance criteria:
- Live verification is part of the official testing story rather than tribal knowledge.
- Failures from nightly/provider suites produce the same structured artifacts and redaction guarantees as local E2E runs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:38.290317Z","created_by":"LilacLake","updated_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:48.970913Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","live","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.14","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:38.290317Z","created_by":"LilacLake","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.14","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:47.980156Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.14","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:48.229073Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.14","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:48.477071Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.14","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:48.721570Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.14","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:48.970319Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.2","title":"Define testing policy and acceptance taxonomy for unit, non-mock integration, host-backed E2E, and live suites","description":"Background:
- "Full unit coverage without mocks/fake stuff" needs a precise repo-specific translation or people will talk past each other.
- For many connectors, pure unit tests are still valuable, but a mock-backed suite cannot be the final acceptance boundary.

Deliverables:
- Define a testing taxonomy covering at minimum: pure unit, deterministic contract/integration (mock-backed), local non-mock fixture integration, host-backed subprocess E2E, and provider-sandbox/nightly live verification.
- State the minimum required suite for each connector archetype (request-response, webhook, streaming, queue, DB, file/blob, CLI/process, browser, bridge-backed/mobile, local-platform).
- Make the naming rule explicit: if a suite depends on `wiremock`, fake polling APIs, stub connectors, or mock servers, it is supplemental confidence and must not be mislabeled as the only acceptance evidence.
- Define acceptable exceptions and the evidence required when a fully local non-mock path is impossible.

Acceptance criteria:
- New and existing connectors can be evaluated against one unambiguous checklist.
- The policy closes the ambiguity between deterministic contract coverage and real acceptance coverage.
- The policy includes logging/redaction expectations for every E2E-capable suite.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseDesert","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:34.120505Z","created_by":"LilacLake","updated_at":"2026-03-23T08:38:43Z","closed_at":"2026-03-23T08:38:43Z","close_reason":"Defined explicit testing taxonomy, archetype acceptance minimums, and E2E logging/redaction policy in the V3 contract","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","policy","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:34.120505Z","created_by":"LilacLake","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:39.069474Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.3","title":"Harden shared E2E logging/reporting across fcp-e2e, fcp-testkit, and fwc","description":"Background:
- The repo already has structured E2E logging in `crates/fcp-e2e/src/logging.rs`, a CLI runner in `crates/fcp-e2e/src/bin/fcp-e2e.rs`, log scanning in `crates/fcp-testkit/src/log_scan.rs`, and scenario machinery in `crates/fwc/src/e2e_scripts.rs`.
- Those pieces need to become the standard acceptance surface rather than a partial helper library.

Deliverables:
- Expand the shared JSONL schema so each run records per-step command metadata, stdout/stderr capture, artifact paths, retries, timing, correlation IDs, prerequisite state, and failure reason summaries.
- Ensure the runner can persist machine-readable reports and human-readable summaries without losing detail.
- Integrate redaction/secret scanning into the normal E2E flow, not as an optional afterthought.
- Make failure bundles self-sufficient for debugging: if a test fails in CI or nightly, the artifact set should explain what happened without rerunning interactively.

Acceptance criteria:
- `fcp-e2e`, `fcp-testkit`, and `fwc` expose one coherent reporting story.
- All required log artifacts validate against a shared schema and are scanned for secret leakage.
- The resulting output is detailed enough to support large-scale connector sweeps and flaky-test triage.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseDesert","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:34.437627Z","created_by":"LilacLake","updated_at":"2026-03-23T09:14:10.779556Z","closed_at":"2026-03-23T09:14:10.779261Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","logging","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:34.437627Z","created_by":"LilacLake","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:39.303822Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.4","title":"Build reusable non-mock HTTP fixture harnesses for request-response connectors","description":"Background:
- A large share of connectors currently validate HTTP behavior through `wiremock` or `MockApiServer`.
- That is useful for deterministic contract checks, but it is not sufficient for the requested no-mock acceptance bar.

Deliverables:
- Build reusable non-mock HTTP/SaaS fixture harnesses that run as real subprocess services and exercise auth, pagination, rate limits, webhooks, uploads/downloads, retries, redirects, error bodies, and timeout behavior through real networking stacks.
- Provide fixture startup/teardown helpers and seeded scenarios that Rust tests can invoke deterministically.
- Standardize request/response recording and structured diagnostics so family-wave tasks can reuse the same evidence format.

Acceptance criteria:
- HTTP connector waves can stop depending on `wiremock` as their only acceptance path.
- Fixtures are reusable across multiple connector families instead of one-off per connector.
- The fixture harnesses integrate cleanly with the logging/reporting stack from the E2E task.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:34.758493Z","created_by":"LilacLake","updated_at":"2026-03-23T09:04:05.740718Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","fixtures","http","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:34.758493Z","created_by":"LilacLake","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-23T08:04:39.535179Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

+{"id":"flywheel_connectors-49z0b.4.1","title":"Canonical subprocess HTTP fixture contract and scenario inventory","description":"Background:
